step_rationale: Activates antioxidant pathways protecting endothelial integrity; mediates endothelial detachment resistance.
mechanism: Nrf2 activates endothelial protective antioxidant responses and suppresses dysfunction-driven cap erosion.

references.title: A Nrf2-OSGIN1&2-HSP70 axis mediates cigarette smoke-induced endothelial detachment: implications for plaque erosion.
